Texts.Name: Subtítulo
Texts.TextMessage: Dive into this adventure

Texts.Name: Título
Texts.TextMessage:
Escape game
submarine

Texts.Name: Particip...
Texts.TextMessage: Participate in this exciting underwater adventure in search of lost treasures. The evil Anglerfish King has taken the keys to the chest; face him to recover them! Solve the riddles and challenges you encounter along the way and seize the hidden loot in the depths of the sea!

Texts.Name: LEVEL 1:...
Texts.TextMessage:
LEVEL 1:
Rocky Valley

Texts.Name: Answer t...
Texts.TextMessage: Answer the questions correctly to advance and avoid crashing into the rocks.

Texts.Name: LEVEL 2:...
Texts.TextMessage:
LEVEL 2:
Dark Abyss

Texts.Name: You have...
Texts.TextMessage: You have entered the deepest darkness at the bottom of the ocean. Drag the spotlight to find the correct answer and avoid the Eel King’s henchmen!

Texts.Name: Drag the...
Texts.TextMessage: Drag the focus!

Texts.Name: Find the...
Texts.TextMessage:
Find the correct answer
Which of these animals is known for having a hard shell and claws?

Texts.Name: Find the...
Texts.TextMessage:
Find the correct answer
Which of these marine animals is known to be the largest in the world?

Texts.Name: Find the...
Texts.TextMessage:
Find the correct answer
Which of these elements is most abundant in the oceans?

Texts.Name: Find the...
Texts.TextMessage:
Find the correct answer
What is the name of the largest ocean in the world?

Texts.Name: LEVEL 3:...
Texts.TextMessage:
LEVEL 3:
Lush barrier

Texts.Name: A large ...
Texts.TextMessage: A large seaweed barrier blocks your way. Choose the correct answer before time runs out!

Texts.Name: LEVEL 4:...
Texts.TextMessage:
LEVEL 4:
Multi-path Cave

Texts.Name: You have...
Texts.TextMessage: You have reached a cave where you will need to choose the right path. Follow your instinct and be careful not to get lost!

Texts.Name: Observe ...
Texts.TextMessage:
Observe the images and answer
Which is a clownfish?

Texts.Name: Observe ...
Texts.TextMessage:
Observe the images and answer
Which one is a common crab?

Texts.Name: Observe ...
Texts.TextMessage:
Observe the images and respond
Which is a sea shell?

Texts.Name: Observe ...
Texts.TextMessage:
Observe the images and respond
Which one is a seahorse?

Texts.Name: LEVEL 5:...
Texts.TextMessage:
LEVEL 5:
Marine Opera

Texts.Name: You hear...
Texts.TextMessage: You hear a melody in the distance... It's the opera from the depths of the sea that has decided to organize a concert! Identify and match which sound corresponds to each musician so you can progress.

Texts.Name: Drag the...
Texts.TextMessage: Drag the words to their corresponding sound

Texts.Name: Drag the...
Texts.TextMessage: Drag the words to their corresponding sound

Texts.Name: Drag the...
Texts.TextMessage: Drag the words to their corresponding sound

Texts.Name: Drag the...
Texts.TextMessage: Drag the words to their corresponding sound

Texts.Name: You have...
Texts.TextMessage:
You have defeated
the Anguilla King!
Come on, use the key!

Texts.Name: Choose y...
Texts.TextMessage: Choose your treasure chest

Texts.Name: You have...
Texts.TextMessage: You have found a chest full of relics worth a fortune. Get ready to make gold when you reach the surface!

Texts.Name: Who woul...
Texts.TextMessage: <font color="#ffffff">Who would have thought that inside the treasure is hidden... a map to another treasure? It seems that the adventures of this submarine don't end here! </font>

Texts.Name: It seems...
Texts.TextMessage: It seems that the henchmen of King Anguila have chosen you as the new sovereign. Will you choose the path of good or prefer to maintain the legacy of evil?

Texts.Name: You will...
Texts.TextMessage: You will lose all your progress

Texts.Name: Are you ...
Texts.TextMessage: Are you sure you want to go back to the start?
